testcase.name: test_should_create_repository_successfully
testcase.failure:
repo_api = <services.github_repositories_api.GitHubRepositoriesAPI object at 0x0000015628079B20> repository = 'mi-repo-de-prueba'
@pytest.mark.functional @pytest.mark.acceptance @pytest.mark.smoke def test_should_create_repository_successfully(repo_api, repository):
# Arrange payload = CREATE_REPO_PAYLOAD logger.info( f"Preparing payload for repository creation: { payload['name']}")
# Act logger.info("Executing API request to create a new repository") response = repo_api.create_repo(payload) response_body = response.json()
# Assert 1 — Status Code logger.info("Verifying response status code is 201") > assert response.status_code == 201 E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
tests\repositories\test_repository.py:33: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_should_delete_existing_repository
testcase.failure:
repo_api = <services.github_repositories_api.GitHubRepositoriesAPI object at 0x0000015627FE1400> repository = 'mi-repo-de-prueba'
@pytest.mark.functional @pytest.mark.acceptance @pytest.mark.smoke def test_should_delete_existing_repository(repo_api, repository):
# Arrange repo_api.create_repo(CREATE_REPO_PAYLOAD) time.sleep(3) repo_name = CREATE_REPO_PAYLOAD["name"] logger.info(f"Preparing to delete repository '{repo_name}'")
# Act logger.info("Executing DELETE request to remove repository") response = repo_api.delete_repo(repo_name)
# Assert 1 — Status Code logger.info("Verifying response status code is 204") > assert response.status_code == 204 E assert 403 == 204 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
tests\repositories\test_repository.py:159: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_should_create_repository_with_wiki_disabled

repo_api = <services.github_repositories_api.GitHubRepositoriesAPI object at 0x000001562803B7A0> repository = 'mi-repo-de-prueba'
@pytest.mark.functional @pytest.mark.regression def test_should_create_repository_with_wiki_disabled(repo_api, repository):

# Act response = repo_api.create_repo(payload) response_body = response.json()
# Assert 1 — Status Code > assert response.status_code == 201 E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
